verses.text: Tua hun laitakin gam tampi a uk Sisar Augustas in ama ukna gamsung mi a phazah a kitheihna dingin mi khempeuh min sazian a kilakna dingin thu a pia hi
Kuirinias in Syria gam a uksawn hun laitakin hih bangin mi phazah kisimna thu hong piang hi
Tua ahih manin amau khua ciatah min pia dingin mi khempeuh a pai uh hi
Josef zong David' suante khat ahih manin Galilee gamsung Nazareth khua panin David' suahna khua ahi Judea gam Bethlehem khua-ah a pai hi
Tua bangin min sazian kikhumsak dingin a pai ciangin ten'pih dingin zuthawl a piaksa a lawmnu Mary tawh a paikhawm uh hi. A lawmnu naupaii hi a
Bethlehem khua-ah a tam sungun a nausuah ding hun hong tung hi
Zintun'na ding mun dang khempeuh mi dim khinta ahih manin ganbukah tung uh a, a tacil ahi ta pasal khat nei-in, puan tawh tunin gan annekna kuang sungah a sial hi.
Tua hun laitakin gamlakah a tuuhonte a giahpih tuucing pawlkhat a om uh hi
Amaute kiangah Topa' vantung mi khat hong kilang a, Topa' minthan'na vang in amaute hong taan' ahih manin a lau mahmah uh hi
Ahi zongin vantung mi in, “Lau kei un. Mi khempeuh a lungdamsak ding thuthak hoih khat note-a' ding ka hong puak hi
Tuni-in David khuapi sungah, note a hong honkhia ding Khrih Topa a suak hi
Amah na theihna ding uh a lim hih bang hi ding hi: Puan tawh kitun naungek khat, gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua khit phetin tua vantung mi tawh vantung mihonpite thakhatin hong omin Pasian phatna la sa uh a
“Van a sang belna-ah a om Pasian' min thang hen la, ama pahtak leitung mite tungah nopna om ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Vantung mite vantungah a ciahkik khit uh ciangin tuucingte in, “Bethlehem khua-ah pai-in, Topa' hong gen hih thupiang va en ni,” a kici uh hi
Amaute nawhpai mahmah uh a, Mary leh Josef leh gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial naungek a mupah uh hi
Tua bangin naungek a muh uh ciangin, vantung mi in amaute kiangah hih naungek tawh kisai thu a gente a gensawn uh hi
Hih tuucingte' thugen a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi
Mary in ahih leh a lungsimah hih thute ciamtehin a ngaihsunsun hi
Tuucingte zong ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah a kigensa bangin a zaksa leh a muhsa uh thute hangin Pasian' min a phat uh hi.
Naungek a vun a ki-at ni hun nipikal khat a cin' khit ciangin, amah a kipaii ma-in a min dingin vantung mi in a piaksa ahi Jesuh, a min dingin a phuak uh hi.
Moses Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in Josef leh Mary a kisian'suah ding uh hun hong tung hi. Tua ahih manin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin Jerusalem-ah a paipih uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' Thukham sungah, “Ta pasal masa peuhmah Topa tungah ki-ap ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Topa Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin a pia dingin zong a pai uh ahi hi
Jerusalem khuasungah Simeon a kici mi khat na om hi. Amah a thuman, a biakna mi mahmah khat hi a, Israel mite a kihotkhiat hun ding a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Kha Siangtho in a ompih mi khat hi a
Topa' hong ciamsa Khrih a muh matengin a sihlohna ding thu zong ama tungah Kha Siangtho in na genkhin hi
Kha Siangtho' makaihna tawh biakinn sungah Simeon a pai hi. A nu leh a pate in thukham sunga om ngeina bangin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin biakinn-ah a hong paipih uh ciangin
Simeon in naungek la-in a ang-ah tawi-in Pasian' tungah lungdamna ko a
“Topa aw, na thuciamna tu-in nong tungsak a, na nasempa keima lungsim nong nuamsak hi
Ka mit mahmah tawh nong hotkhiatna ka mukhin a
minam khempeuh' muhin nong tungsak a
Gentail mite in khuavak a muhna ding leh nangma mi Israel-te a minthan'na dingin na vaihawm hi,” a ci hi
Naungek' nu leh pate in, hih bangin Simeon in naungek' thu a genna a zak uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi

Tua ciangin Simeon in amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin naungek' nu Mary kiangah, “Hih naungek pen, Israel mite sungah mi tampi in siatna a ngahna ding, leh mi tampi in hotkhiatna a ngahna ding ahi hi. Mi tampi in hih naungek nial ding uh a
mite' lungsimtawng a kilatna hong hi ding hi. Dahna lungkhamna in namsau hiam bangin nangma lungsim mahmah zong hong sunkham ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua laitakin Asher minamte sung panin Fanuel' tanu Anna minnei kamsang numei khat a om hi. Amah a khangham mahmah khat hi a, a nungak laitakin a neih a pasal tawh kum sagih sung a ten'khop khit ciangin
kum sawmgiat leh kum li sung meigongin a om ahi hi. Amah pen biakna a nusia ngeilo mi khat hi a, a sun a zanin Pasian bia-in an tangin thu a ngenngen mi khat ahi hi
Tua bangin Jesuh a ki-ap hun laitakin hih kamsangnu hong pai-in Pasian tungah lungdamna ko a, Jerusalem a suahtakna ding lamenin a ngak mi khempeuh tungah hih naungek' thu a gen hi.
Amaute in Topa' Thukham tawh kizui-in hihding a kisam khempeuh a bawl khit uh ciangin Galilee gam, amau khua Nazareth-ah a ciahkik uh hi
Tua naupang hong khangin hong thahat hi. Lungpilna tawh kidim a, Pasian in thupha a pia hi.
Kumsimin Jerusalem khua-a Paisan Pawi a kibawlna-ah Jesuh' nu leh pa a pai zel uh ahi hi
Jesuh, kum sawmlenih a phak ciangin a ngeina bangin tua pawi-ah a thumun a pai uh hi
Tua pawi vengin a ciahkik uh ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah naupang Jesuh kinusia kha hi. A nu leh a pa in a nusiatlam uh theilo uh hi
Amaute' honlak mahah a omomin ngaihsun uh ahih manin ni khat lam paikhin uh a, tua ciangin a lawmte leh a tanaute lak khawng a zong pan uh hi
Amah a muh zawhloh uh ciangin Jerusalem-ah kileh kikin a zong uh hi
A ciahzawh uh a ni thum ni ciangin biakinn sungah amah mu uh a, siate lakah tu-in a thugen uh ngai-in, thu zong dong zelin a om a mu uh hi
Amah in pilna tawh thu genin a dawn'na a za mite khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh hi
A nu leh a pa in a muh uh ciangin lamdangsa uh a, a nu in, “Ka ta aw, bang hangin hong hici bawl na hi hiam? Na pa tawh lungkham mahmahin nang ka hong zong uh hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in a nu leh a pa kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong zong na hi uh hiam? Ka Pa' inn sungah ka om ding lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Ahi zongin bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nu leh a pa in theilo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin a nu leh a pa zui-in Nazareth khua-ah ciahkik a, amaute' thu mangin tua lai-ah hoihtakin a om hi. A nu in hih thu khempeuh a lungsim sungah ngaihsunsun hi
Jesuh a pumpi leh a pilna khang a, ama gamtatna in Pasian leh mite a lungkimsak semsem hi.
